rationale: In the body, Koukova et al. is cited to ground how quality in digital content includes presentation and format attributes, which is part of the citing paper's conceptual setup. In the conclusion, the authors explicitly link their main result to Koukova et al.'s multiformat bundle-choice finding and interpret sampling as a bundle-like setting (free sample plus paid format). This goes beyond a passing literature-list mention and is used to position and interpret the contribution.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Koukova et al. (2012)'s multiformat quality-and-bundling insight to a free-sampling/freemium context. It uses that prior idea to explain why higher-quality samples for higher-quality content can increase paid demand.
